1.content: Drilldown of Grafana **Total GC Pause Time**. Dynatrace splits by JVM process (not host label).

2.title: GC Pause Time by Process
2.query:
timeseries gc_ms=sum(dt.runtime.jvm.gc.total_collection_time), by:{dt.entity.process_group_instance}
| fieldsAdd process=entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| filter isNotNull(process)
| fieldsRemove dt.entity.process_group_instance
